title: DMD Advocates appoints Anand Mohan as Head of Strategy
description: Khaitan & Co Senior Manager Anand Mohan has joined DMD Advocates as the Head of Strategy.Mohan has experience across leading professional services firms, including Khaitan & Co, Boston Consulting Group, and Bain & Company, with expertise in strategy and business development, complemented by strong capabilities in analytics and compliance.Prior to his move to DMD Advocates, Mohan served as a Senior Manager at Khaitan & Co for the past seven years.At DMD, Mohan will work closely wi
